cards.english: I go to the park every morning.
This is my favorite place.
We are going to the house of my friend.
She washes her hands before eating.
Where do you go when you want to think?
He goes to the office, and I go to the school.
I wake myself up early if I have work.
cards.answer: **Me** wake up early **si** I have work.

cards.english: They go from the hotel to the beach.
We have gone to that place two times.
The keys of the car are in the drawer.
Are you going to eat with us?
He sat himself down because he was tired.
Going to the gym has been good for me.
Let's go! The movie is starting.
This place is far from the center of the city.
We prepare ourselves for the trip.
If you go to the store, I can go with you.
She has gone to her friend's house.
You call yourself an artist, and it is true.
I go to that place because it was my grandfather's favorite.
